cards.en: ABOVE — above the clouds / the picture above the sofa
OVER — a bridge over the river / a blanket over him
BELOW — below sea level / below the surface
UNDER — under the table / under the bed
BESIDE / NEXT TO — beside the window / next to the bank
OPPOSITE — opposite the station / sit opposite each other
BETWEEN — between the two chairs / between 5 and 6
AMONG — among the trees / among the crowd
IN FRONT OF — in front of the mirror / in front of the class
BEHIND — behind the door / behind the building
NEAR — near the school / near the river
ALONG — along the street / along the coast
THROUGH — through the tunnel / through the forest
ACROSS — across the road / across the river
